name: Angie Craig
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,270,151 for Angie Craig in U.S. House, MN-02. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby. Additional primary-source statements and voting records should continue to be incorporated over time.
